title: Targeting regulatory T cells in the prostate cancer microenvironment: From mechanisms to therapeutics (Review).
snippet: Prostate cancer (PCa) is a heterogeneous cancer. Regulatory T cells (Tregs) within the tumor microenvironment play a pivotal role in promoting immune evasion and disease progression. This review systematically outlines the development, functional characteristics and regulatory networks of Tregs in this environment. Synthesis of recent spatial transcriptomic...
